Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DAVID TETER'S RENOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ERIK NEWTON FOR FURTHER RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Emily Knoles, Esq. of Peretz & Associates 732-3777 for pltf & moving party; Erik W. Newton, Esq. of Heath-Newton LLP 398-1290 opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted in part and denied in part the motion to compel discovery responses. Court denied any sanctions request on either side. Court set compliance/production date at 72 hours before deposition. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
